generation.style: Amadis-style grotesque corrupted monster, readable battle sprite silhouette

prompts.master: full body mutated beast, front view, monstrous anatomy, consistent corrupted details, plain background
prompts.idle: hostile monster idle loop, breathing and twitching, transparent background
prompts.run: aggressive charge run cycle, corrupted beast, transparent background
prompts.hit: violent recoil hit reaction, monster, transparent background
prompts.death: heavy collapse defeat sequence, monster, transparent background
